summary: Completed frontend testing of GP Onboarding mobile responsiveness and training step progression. All 4 requested features verified working correctly on mobile viewport (375x800).

features_verified.verification: Page displays correctly on mobile. Header, progress bar, form fields, and navigation all render properly. Content is readable and interactive elements are accessible.

features_verified.feature: Training step progression - auto-advance to next sub-step
features_verified.verification: After submitting 'About the Company' training step with mark_complete: true, UI automatically advanced to 'About the Skill' step. Toast notification 'Moving to: About the Skill' displayed. Step 1 shows checkmark (completed), Step 2 became active.

features_verified.feature: Training steps navigation tabs - step numbers on mobile
features_verified.verification: Training step buttons show numbers (1, 2, 3, etc.) on mobile instead of full labels. Labels have 'hidden sm:inline' class, numbers have 'sm:hidden' class. Verified buttons display '1', '2', '3' etc. on 375px viewport.

features_verified.feature: Main onboarding steps sidebar - horizontal scrollable on mobile
features_verified.verification: Main steps sidebar has 'overflow-x-auto' class and is horizontally scrollable. scrollWidth: 455px, clientWidth: 335px, isScrollable: true. Steps show numbers (1-6) on mobile with 'lg:hidden' class for number spans.

seed_data_creation: Used existing GP onboarding token 'fab49140' for testing. Completed 'About the Company' training step during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GP Onboarding mobile responsiveness verified on 375x800 viewport. Training step progression bug fix confirmed working - UI auto-advances to next training sub-step after completion. Training steps navigation shows numbers (1-7) on mobile. Main steps sidebar is horizontally scrollable on mobile with step numbers (1-6). Token 'fab49140' has 'About the Company' training step completed.
